common.name: Name
common.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this?
common.confirmDeleteGeneric: Delete this? This cannot be undone.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your business account
auth.forgotPasswordExplain: Sarang works fully offline, so there's no email or SMS reset link. Enter your username and the Recovery Code you saved during setup (or that an administrator gave you) to set a new password.
auth.passwordResetSuccessBody: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in with your new password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.profitEstimateDisclaimer: Estimated using average cost pricing. Verify with your accountant.

billing.title: Billing
billing.bargainedPriceInputHint: Type the final agreed price for this line — the discount is calculated for you.
billing.searchInvoices: Search by invoice #, customer, or phone…
billing.emptyCart: Cart is empty. Add products to start billing.
billing.cancelWarning: Cancelling will restore inventory, reverse any payments, and mark this invoice as CANCELLED. It will remain visible for audit purposes.
billing.splitInstructions: Set how many of each item goes on each check — every item's quantities must add up to what was originally billed.
billing.splitNothingMessage: At least two checks need at least one item each.
billing.tipAmountInvalid: Enter an amount greater than zero.
billing.unavailableTodayMessage: {{productName}} has been marked unavailable for today.
billing.confirmAbandonHeldSale: Discard this held sale? This cannot be undone.
billing.emptyCartCannotHold: Cart is empty — nothing to hold.

rx.title: Prescription Details
rx.description: This is a prescription-only (Schedule H/H1) item — patient and doctor name are required to sell it.
rx.required: Patient name and doctor name are required.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.ledgerHint: Debit = purchase received; Credit = payment made
suppliers.paymentDisclaimer: Sarang records this payment for your books only. Verify payment was actually transferred to the supplier.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.immutableNote: Inventory movements are immutable records and cannot be deleted.
inventory.removeBatchMsg: Remove batch {{batch}}? This will deactivate the batch and deduct {{qty}} units from inventory.

reorder.title: Reorder POs Generated
reorder.nothingToOrder: No low-stock products need reordering right now.

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase Orders
purchaseOrders.cancelPoMsg: The order will be permanently cancelled and cannot be reversed.

sales.label: Sales Report
sales.description: Revenue, discounts, taxes — grouped by day / week / month / year

inventory.label: Inventory Report
inventory.description: Current stock levels, valuation, low-stock alerts

tax.label: Tax Report
tax.description: Tax collected grouped by rate / type for GST / VAT filing

outstanding.description: Customers and suppliers with pending balances

customerLedger.label: Customer Ledger
customerLedger.description: Full transaction statement for a specific customer

supplierLedger.label: Supplier Statement
supplierLedger.description: Full transaction statement for a specific supplier

expenses.label: Expense Report
expenses.description: Expenses by category with totals and breakdown

profitAndLoss.label: Profit & Loss Statement
profitAndLoss.description: Revenue, cost of goods sold, gross profit, expenses by category, and net profit — ready to hand to an accountant

cashBook.label: Cash Book
cashBook.description: A day-by-day register of every payment received and every expense or supplier payment made, with a running balance

trialBalance.label: Trial Balance
trialBalance.description: Debit and credit totals for Cash, Receivables, Payables, Revenue, Tax, COGS, and Expenses — ready to hand to an accountant

audit.label: Audit Log Report
audit.description: Full system action history for compliance and review

backup.label: Backup Report
backup.description: History of all system backups — count, dates, file sizes

foodCost.label: Food Cost Report
foodCost.description: Ingredient usage and cost per KOT fulfillment — Restaurant template

gstr1.label: GSTR-1 Report
gstr1.description: B2B and B2CS tax summary for GST return filing

hsnSummary.label: HSN-Wise Summary
hsnSummary.description: HSN/SAC-wise taxable value and tax breakdown for Table 12 reference

documentSummary.label: Document Summary
documentSummary.description: Invoice, credit note and debit note number series for Table 13 reference

gstr3bPreview.label: GSTR-3B Reconciliation Preview
gstr3bPreview.description: Preview of outward-supply figures to cross-check against your filed GSTR-1

rentalStatus.label: Currently Rented / Overdue
rentalStatus.description: Every item checked out right now, with overdue returns flagged

rentalRevenue.label: Rental Revenue & Utilization
rentalRevenue.description: Revenue by rental item, plus utilization rate for individually-tracked units

hotelOccupancy.label: Room Occupancy
hotelOccupancy.description: Current room status breakdown and occupancy rate, right now

hotelGuestRegister.label: Guest Register
hotelGuestRegister.description: Every registered guest ID for stays overlapping the selected date range — for police/immigration verification

appointmentUtilisation.label: Appointment Utilisation
appointmentUtilisation.description: Completion rates, provider utilisation, peak hours and days

clientRetention.label: Client Retention
clientRetention.description: New vs returning clients, at-risk clients, and visit frequency

commission.label: Commission Report
commission.description: Staff commission earned by period — paid vs unpaid breakdown

orderVolume.label: Order Volume Report
orderVolume.description: Daily QR table-order volume by status — pending, accepted, rejected

batchExpiry.label: Batch & Expiry Report
batchExpiry.description: Stock batches grouped by expiry urgency — expired, critical, warning, safe

labThroughput.label: Lab Test Throughput
labThroughput.description: Test orders by workflow stage with average turnaround time

bloodStock.label: Blood Stock Report
bloodStock.description: Available blood units by group, with expiring-soon alerts

jewellery.label: Jewellery Report
jewellery.description: Metal stock valuation by purity, making-charge revenue, and old-metal exchange summary

projects.label: Project Report
projects.description: Every project by status and estimated amount — for Service Business and Consultant

serviceProjects.label: Service Project Report
serviceProjects.description: Every project by status and contract value — for Independent Consultant, Architect, Civil Engineer, Marketing Agency, Software Agency, and Real Estate Agent

jobCards.label: Job Card Report
jobCards.description: Every repair/service job by status, estimated vs. actual cost — for Repair Shops

carJobCards.label: Job Card Report
carJobCards.description: Labor vs. parts revenue split and technician productivity — for Car Service Centers

tailoringOrders.label: Tailoring Orders Report
tailoringOrders.description: Every order by garment type and status — for Tailor Boutiques

pestContracts.label: Pest Control Report
pestContracts.description: Contracts expiring soon and revenue by pest type — for Pest Control Services

realEstatePipeline.label: Listings & Deals Pipeline
realEstatePipeline.description: Property listings, inquiry stages, and deal pipeline — for Real Estate Agents

retainers.label: Retainer / MRR Report
retainers.description: Monthly recurring revenue and billing status by client retainer

shootBookings.label: Shoot Bookings Report
shootBookings.description: Bookings by shoot type and revenue — for Photography Studios

eventBookings.label: Event Bookings Report
eventBookings.description: Bookings by status and revenue — for Event Management

placements.label: Placement Report
placements.description: Candidate placements, joining status, and commission — for Placement Agencies

drawingRegister.label: Drawing Register
drawingRegister.description: Every drawing revision by discipline and approval status — for Architects

siteVisitLog.label: Site Visit Log
siteVisitLog.description: Every recorded site visit by type — for Civil Engineers

logistics.label: Logistics Report
logistics.description: Shipments, freight cost, delivery rate and top carriers

attendance.label: Attendance Report
attendance.description: Staff presence, absences and attendance rate by employee

production.label: Production Report
production.description: Production orders by status, planned vs. produced quantity

serialWarranty.label: Serial & Warranty Report
serialWarranty.description: Serial numbers by warranty status — expired, expiring soon, active

variantStock.label: Variant Stock Report
variantStock.description: Stock by size/color variant across every product

testScores.label: Test Score Report
testScores.description: Student test/exam scores across every batch — averages, below-50% flags

complianceTasks.label: Compliance Task Report
complianceTasks.description: Pending and overdue statutory tasks across every client

prescriptionDrugSales.label: Prescription Drug Sales
prescriptionDrugSales.description: Register of Schedule H/H1 prescription-only medicine sales, with patient and doctor names.

section.plSummary: Revenue, Gross Profit, Expenses & Net Profit
section.gstr1Disclaimer: This report is for reference only. Verify with a CA before filing on the GST portal.
section.hsnDisclaimer: This report is for reference only — HSN codes must be selected from the government portal's own list when filing. Verify with a CA before filing.
section.documentSummaryDisclaimer: This report is for reference only. Cross-check document series and counts before filing GSTR-1 Table 13.
section.gstr3bDisclaimer: This is a reconciliation preview, not an editable form — GSTR-3B's outward-supply tables now auto-populate from your filed GSTR-1 and cannot be manually entered on the portal. Use this to verify your records match what was filed.
section.table32: Table 3.2 — Inter-State Supplies to Unregistered Persons
section.atRiskBanner: {{count}} client(s) have not visited in over 30 days and may need follow-up.

cashClose.reconcile: Reconcile your cash drawer against recorded sales
cashClose.noPayments: No payments recorded for this date.
cashClose.alreadyClosedBanner: This day was already closed at {{time}} — you can update it below.

returns.title: Returns
returns.findInvoice: Find an invoice and select items to return
returns.invoiceNotFound: Invoice not found or cannot be returned.
returns.returnReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Defective product, customer changed mind
returns.selectItemError: Select at least one item to return.
returns.returnProcessedMsg: Return invoice {{number}} has been created. Inventory has been restocked and customer balance updated.

documents.title: Documents
documents.attachHint: Supported: PDF, images, Excel, Word, CSV, TXT
documents.noDocumentsHint: Attach files from any invoice, customer, or supplier record
documents.confirmDeleteText: will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Protect your business data with regular backups
backup.confirmRestore: Restore this backup? Current data will be replaced.
backup.backupValid: Backup is valid and can be restored
backup.noBackupsDesc: Your data is not backed up. Create a backup now to protect your business data.
backup.infoLocalTitle: Your data stays on your device.
backup.infoLocalDesc: Backups are stored as ZIP files with SHA-256 integrity verification.
backup.infoCopyAdvice: Copy your backup files to an external drive or cloud storage for disaster recovery.
backup.restoreWarningShort: This will replace your current database
backup.restoreWarningFull: A safety backup of your current data will be created first. Then the app will restart with the restored data. Any data created after the selected backup date will be lost.
backup.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete the backup file from disk. This action cannot be undone.
backup.restoringDesc: Creating safety backup, then restoring. App will restart.
backup.recoveryBannerTitle: Your database has an integrity issue.
backup.recoveryBannerAdmin: Select a valid backup below and restore it to recover your data. A copy of your current (damaged) database file will be saved first, so nothing is discarded.
backup.recoveryBannerNonAdmin: Contact an Admin to restore from a valid backup below.
backup.autoBackupDesc: Automatically create a backup on a schedule, without needing to click Create Backup yourself.
backup.settingsInvalidNumber: Please enter a whole number greater than 0 for all fields.
backup.destinationSaveFailed: Could not update the backup folder
backup.destinationUnreachable: "{{path}}" isn't reachable right now (unplugged?) — using the default location instead.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.chainIntact: Chain intact — {{count}} records verified, no tampering detected.
audit.chainBroken: Tampering detected — the chain breaks at record {{id}}… after {{count}} verified records. Investigate immediately.

settings.title: Settings
settings.darkModeHint: Switch to a darker color scheme
settings.taxModelHint: Determines how tax is calculated and displayed on invoices

manual.comingSoon: This chapter is being written and will be available soon.

about.title: About Sarang
about.privacyNote: Your data never leaves your device. No internet required.

manufacturing.noProductionHistory: No production orders for this product yet.

manufacturing.dispatchSubtitle: Track finished goods from production to delivery
manufacturing.vendorSubtitle: Suppliers who provide raw materials for production
manufacturing.noVendorLinked: No vendors linked to raw materials.

manufacturing.bomHint: The product must have a Bill of Materials configured. Raw materials will be deducted when you start the order.
manufacturing.noStepsHint: No steps defined yet. Click '+ Add Steps' to break this order into tasks.
manufacturing.completeHint: Enter the actual quantity produced. This will be added to {{product}} inventory.
manufacturing.cancelHint: Raw materials will be returned to stock when this order is cancelled.
manufacturing.addMaterialRequired: Add at least one raw material.

manufacturing.orderCompleted: Order completed. {{qty}} units added to inventory.
manufacturing.addOneStep: Add at least one work step.
manufacturing.noOrdersDesc: Create your first production order to get started.
manufacturing.noBatchesYet: No lots received yet for this material.

setup.subtitle: Set up your business in a few steps

hr.employeesDesc: Manage your team members and their details.
hr.noEmployeesDesc: Add your first employee to get started.
hr.qualifiedServicesHint: Services this staff member can perform. Leave empty to allow any service (default).
hr.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate {{name}}? They will no longer appear in attendance.
hr.salaryReferenceDesc: Monthly salary reference based on attendance. Not a certified payslip.
hr.salaryDisclaimer: For internal reference only. Consult a payroll specialist for statutory compliance.
hr.salaryBannerDisclaimer: Salary figures shown here are for internal reference only. They do not constitute certified payslips, PF/ESIC calculations, or statutory payroll. Consult a qualified payroll specialist or CA for compliance.
hr.noSalaryData: No salary data for this month.
hr.addEmployeesFirst: Add employees and configure their salary to see this report.
hr.payrollDesc: Generate monthly payroll, record deductions, mark salaries paid, and print payslips.
hr.noPayrollForPeriod: No payroll generated for this period yet.
hr.generatePayrollFirst: Click "Generate Payroll" to create draft salary records for all active employees.
hr.payslipDeductionDisclaimer: Sarang does not calculate PF/ESI/Professional Tax/TDS amounts — enter the figures your accountant provides.
hr.confirmMarkPaid: Mark this salary as paid? This creates an expense record and locks the payslip from further edits.
hr.attendanceDesc: Mark daily attendance for all employees.
hr.noEmployeesForAttendance: No active employees found. Add employees first.
hr.leaveDesc: Manage leave requests and leave types.

quotations.title: Quotations
quotations.atLeastOneItem: Add at least one item to the quotation

disclaimer.legalNotice: Sarang Business OS Lite is a free organisational tool for small businesses. It is not a medical record system, accounting software, legal advice tool, or licensed financial product. All information is the user's own data stored locally on their device. Aszurex provides no warranties for the accuracy, completeness, or fitness of this software for any regulated purpose. Users are solely responsible for compliance with applicable laws and professional regulations.

compliance.disclaimerText: Compliance dates are indicative. Verify current due dates with gst.gov.in and incometax.gov.in. Aszurex accepts no liability for missed filings based on dates shown here.

fleet.empty: No vehicles found. Add your first vehicle.

shipments.originAddressPlaceholder: Where is this shipment coming from?
shipments.noItemsHint: No items added. Click + Add Item to record what's in this shipment.
shipments.deleteConfirm: Delete shipment {{number}}? This cannot be undone.

stops.primaryHint: The destination above is always the first stop — add more below for a multi-stop route.

grn.title: Goods Receipt Notes (GRN)
grn.empty: No GRNs found. Create one to record goods received.
grn.poHint: Items below were pre-filled from the PO. Adjust received quantities to record a partial receipt.
grn.supplierHint: (pick an existing one, or type a name below)
grn.postConfirm: Post this GRN? This will update inventory and cannot be undone.
grn.reverseConfirm: Reverse GRN {{number}}? This will remove the stock it added and credit back the supplier ledger. Only possible if none of the stock has been used since.
grn.deleteConfirm: Delete GRN {{number}}? This cannot be undone.
grn.atLeastOneItem: At least one item is required.
grn.atLeastOneValidItem: At least one valid item with a received quantity is required.
grn.atLeastOneValidEditItem: At least one valid item is required.
grn.revertToDraftNote: Saving will reset this GRN to DRAFT — it must be re-verified before posting.
grn.unlinkedWarning: Not linked to a catalog product — won't affect Inventory when posted

challan.title: Delivery Challans
challan.returnDialogHint: Enter the quantity returned for each item. Only items with a return qty greater than 0 will be recorded.

challan.atLeastOneItem: At least one item is required.
challan.atLeastOneValidItem: At least one valid item is required.
challan.atLeastOneReturnQty: At least one item must have a return quantity greater than 0.

form.totalSummary: Total: {{total}} · Balance due: {{balance}} · +5% GST on invoice

rental.confirmCancel: Cancel this reservation? This cannot be undone.
rental.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields.
rental.unitsDesc: The individual asset roster for items tracked one-by-one (cars, bikes, homes, gaming stations).
rental.confirmDeleteUnit: Delete this unit? This cannot be undone.

empty.revenue: No rental revenue in this period.

jewellery.metalRatesDesc: Today's per-gram rate by metal type and purity — used to price every jewellery item at billing time.
jewellery.noRatesDesc: Jewellery items can't be priced or sold until a rate is set for their metal type and purity.
jewellery.confirmDeleteRate: Delete this rate? Products priced against it will show "no rate configured" until a new one is set.
jewellery.exchangesDesc: Record a gold/silver/platinum trade-in. Apply the computed value as a discount on the customer's new purchase invoice.
jewellery.markAppliedTitle: Mark {{number}} as applied to a sale
jewellery.linkHint: This is a record-keeping link only — apply the {{amount}} credit as a discount on that invoice yourself in Billing.
jewellery.linkedDesc: Exchange marked as applied to this sale.
jewellery.exchangeRecordedDesc: {{number}} — {{amount}} credit. Apply this as a discount on the customer's purchase invoice.
jewellery.selectCustomerOrWalkIn: Select a customer or enter a walk-in name.
jewellery.validRateRequired: Enter a valid rate greater than zero.
jewellery.validWeightRequired: Enter a valid gross weight greater than zero.
jewellery.selectMetalTypePlaceholder: Not a metal item — use Selling Price above
jewellery.jewelleryPriceNote: The real sale price is computed at billing time from today's metal rate — Selling Price above is ignored for this item. Set today's rates in Jewellery → Metal Rates.
jewellery.noRateSetDesc: No rate configured for {{metalType}} {{purity}}. Set today's rate in Jewellery → Metal Rates, then re-add this item.
jewellery.computeErrorDesc: Could not compute jewellery price. Please check the rate and re-add this item.
jewellery.priceNotSetDesc: {{productName}} has no price yet — set today's rate in Jewellery → Metal Rates, then remove and re-add this item.
jewellery.makingChargeOverrideHint: Override the making charge for this sale only — the product's own configured charge is unchanged.
jewellery.applyExchangeDesc: Applies an unlinked exchange's credit as a discount on this invoice automatically when you complete the sale.
jewellery.noUnlinkedExchanges: No unlinked exchanges found for this customer.
jewellery.exchangeApplied: Exchange {{number}} — {{amount}} credit will be applied on checkout.

fieldOrders.title: Field Orders
fieldOrders.subtitle: Orders submitted by reps from the field, awaiting confirmation
fieldOrders.linkDescription: Share this link (or QR code) with your field reps — they can capture orders from their own phone on the shop's WiFi.
fieldOrders.notRunning: Field order capture is not currently running. Enable "Field Order Capture" in Settings to let reps submit orders from their own phone.
fieldOrders.empty: No field orders waiting for confirmation.
fieldOrders.acceptHint: Prices are re-checked (including any negotiated customer pricing) at confirmation, and an invoice is created.
fieldOrders.invoiceCreated: Invoice created from this field order.
fieldOrders.couldNotLoad: Could not load incoming field orders.
fieldOrders.regeneratedMessage: A new field order link has been generated.
fieldOrders.regenerateConfirm: Regenerating breaks any link/QR code already shared with your reps — they will need the new one. Continue?

pricing.title: Customer Class Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Set negotiated prices per customer class (e.g. RETAILER, WHOLESALER, VIP) — overrides the list price for any customer with that class.
pricing.noClassMessage: Enter a customer class, e.g. RETAILER.
